Metadata.title: aooi.ai — AI pet portraits
Metadata.description: Simple, beautiful AI pet portraits for subscribers. Upload a photo, pick a style, download high-resolution art.

Home.title: AI pet portrait SaaS
Home.lead: Start with <fast>fast previews</fast> to reduce wait time. Need print-ready quality? <pricing>Add HD packs</pricing>. Queue, fal.ai, and Stripe wiring completes the full loop.

Pricing.title: Pricing & add-ons
Pricing.intro: Lead with <fast>fast generation</fast> to lower friction, then unlock HD and top-ups via <addon>add-ons</addon>. Fill in amounts and Stripe Price IDs before launch.
Pricing.addonSectionBody: When users don’t want to change tiers, packs improve ARPU. Use Stripe Checkout or the Customer Portal and bind credits on the server.
Pricing.addonPlaceholder: Placeholder · show price and buy button after Stripe

fast.name: Fast generation
fast.blurb: Quick previews for onboarding and playtests. Lower compute cost.

standard.name: Standard HD
standard.blurb: Everyday sharing quality. Balanced cost and fidelity.

fastTopUp.name: Fast top-up pack
fastTopUp.desc: After free quota runs out, keep low-cost fast generations.

hdPack.name: HD credit pack
hdPack.desc: Buy FLUX dev credits per image without an annual commitment.

Generate.title: Generate
Generate.intro: Default to <fast>fast generation</fast> (low cost, quick preview). For poster quality, <pricing>add an HD pack</pricing>.
Generate.tierFastBody: Speed first for drafts and try-outs. Uses the Banana route.
Generate.tierHdBody: FLUX tier. Requires purchased credits or an active subscription.
Generate.hdPanelBody: After you buy an HD pack or upgrade, we verify credits before calling FLUX. You can still use Fast generation to test the flow.
Generate.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Golden retriever, royal oil portrait, soft key light…
